channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: French Bla Bla Coach parked overnight on Dulwich Wood Avenue, 8th May
item.description:
The coaches are not allowed to park overnight on Dulwich Wood Avenue. This coach is not only breaking the law, it is also blocking the view when trying to cross the street. Coach registration no.FN-051-BG. The coach is constantly parking overnight around Dulwich Wood Avenue. The residents have had enough.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oakfield Gardens, Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown trees and bushes, 8th May
item.description:
Outside number 120 Southborough Road next to the 336 bus stop it’s very hard to walk on the pavement due to this ongoing problem needs cutting right back.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lancaster Gardens, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bike left outside 291, 8th May
item.description:
Fed up of abandon bikes one right in the way of our exit/entrance to the house
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lee High Road, Blackheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lack of grounds maintenance at Naylor House SE17 2SN, 8th May
item.description:
There are weeds growing along the walls, outside of designated planting areas. Residents shouldn’t have to report this issue. The grounds maintenance team should have a check list and scheduled maintenance for this type of cleaning.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tisdall Place, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blue minivan with flat tyres, 8th May
item.description:
Van looks like it’s been dumped. Has flat tyres, isn’t MOT’d and is full of cobwebs. Has been there a couple of weeks now and not moved
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Diameter Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping at Naylor House SE17 2SN, 8th May
item.description:
Ongoing Fly tipping. The Resident Services Officer also needs to advise all residents of Naylor House to dispose of their waste in the appropriate bins and not leave them on the grounds. A letter through every resident’s letter box should suffice.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tisdall Place, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Domestic goods flytipped, 8th May
item.description:
Frequent dumping ground, on council estate. This is next to the entrance. The other side of the entrance also has a pile of flytipping

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thorburn Square, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole near the Station in the main highway, 8th May
item.description:
Not marked up for attention.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southborough Road, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 3 Wicklow Street WC1X, 8th May
item.description:
The Drain is blocked

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 141, Wicklow Street, King's Cross, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Traffic lights are timed correctly, 8th May
item.description:
Traffic lights aren’t timed correctly and the buses turning onto Graham Road are often running into pedestrians when they are crossing on a green light.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Graham Road, Hackney, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bags being left out days early, 8th May
item.description:
Collection day is Tuesday

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clevedon Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 8th May
item.description:
Flytipping of furniture and house junk

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rolls Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London

item.title: Bags being left out days early, 8th May
item.description:

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Garnham Close, Hackney, London

item.title: Damaged virgin media cabinet from rta, 8th May
item.description:
Risk due to cabinet being unstable and rocking on base. Possible risk of cabinet falling over on children please pass to virgin media to make safe.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Valence Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bags being left out days early, 8th May

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Garnham Close, Hackney, London

item.title: Exposed Wiring, 8th May
item.description:
The wiring is exposed, posing a safety risk to children and dogs. The cover should be repaired or replaced to ensure the wiring is fully concealed.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Queensdown Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Street Light - Equipment damaged, pole leaning

item.title: Rubbish dumped blocking pavement, 8th May
item.description:
As per image...

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clevedon Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree roots damaging pavement and affecting parking access, 8th May
item.description:
The tree roots at this location appear to be lifting and damaging the pavement surface. The pavement has become uneven and raised, which may present a trip hazard and safety risk to pedestrians. The root growth is also affecting parking access in the area
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chatsworth Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bags being left out days early, 8th May
item.description:
Collection day is Tuesday

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Garnham Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
